generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values national security, I'm glad to see our leaders reinforcing NATO commitments. The recent exercises show we're serious about deterrence without sacrificing civil liberties. Some critics claim we're overcommitting, but our allies are stepping up too - Germany just announced increased defense spending. This is about smart burden-sharing, not blind loyalty. #StrongAlliances #NationalSecurityFirst
